title: The Chill Factor
overview: A group of snowmobilers become trapped on a lake, and hole up in an abandoned camp once used by a satanic cult for its rituals.

trailers.title: Demon Possessed (The Chill Factor) Original VHS Trailer (Christopher Webster, 1993)
I became a big fan of snowmobiles after Wisconsin
His helmet melted to his costume during this fire stunt!
There was no CGI at the time, we did it all for real
